targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() as time, AVG(t.value) as value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi t JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE t.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM tsqmi_tsqmi WHERE repository_id = t.repository_id)

SELECT NOW() as time, r.name as metric, t.value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi t JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = t.repository_id WHERE t.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (repository_id) id FROM tsqmi_tsqmi ORDER BY repository_id, created_at DESC)
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(*) as value FROM measures_calculatedmeasure
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(*) as value FROM metrics_collectedmetric
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(DISTINCT repository_id) as value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(DISTINCT path) as value FROM metrics_collectedmetric WHERE qualifier = 'FIL'
SELECT NOW() as time, metric_type as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM metrics_supportedmetric GROUP BY metric_type ORDER BY value DESC

WITH realizados AS (
    SELECT sc.name AS char_name, sc.key AS char_key,
           ROUND(AVG(cc.value)::numeric, 3)    AS realizado,
           ROUND(STDDEV(cc.value)::numeric, 3) AS dispersao
    FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc
    JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id
    WHERE cc.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    GROUP BY sc.name, sc.key
),
planejados AS (
    SELECT elem.key AS char_key,
           ROUND((elem.value::numeric / 100), 3) AS planejado
    FROM goals_goal g
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(g.data::jsonb) AS elem(key, value)
    WHERE g.id = (SELECT id FROM goals_goal ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
)
SELECT r.char_name                AS char_name,
       COALESCE(p.planejado, 0.5) AS planejado,
       r.realizado                AS realizado,
       COALESCE(r.dispersao, 0)   AS dispersao
FROM realizados r
LEFT JOIN planejados p ON p.char_key = r.char_key
ORDER BY r.char_name
